title: Fix chat messages visibility in conversation history

requirements.summary: Fix ConversationHistory component to ensure both user messages and Ana's responses are visibly rendered with proper contrast, styling, and alignment in both light and dark themes
acceptanceCriteria: User-sent messages appear as right-aligned bubbles with clearly visible text and background color
Ana's response messages appear as left-aligned cards with clearly visible text and background
Messages are readable in both light and dark theme modes
No messages are hidden, transparent, or zero-opacity
Existing right-alignment behavior from version 36 is preserved

file_operations.description: Inspect and fix the message rendering logic to ensure both user-sent messages (right-aligned warm-coral bubbles) and Ana's responses (left-aligned frosted-glass cards) are visibly rendered. Verify that CSS classes are correctly applied and that no inline styles or conditional logic is setting opacity to 0, visibility to hidden, or transparent backgrounds. Ensure text color has sufficient contrast against bubble backgrounds in both light and dark themes. Preserve the right-alignment behavior for sent messages.

Review and fix the CSS custom properties and utility classes for chat bubbles (.sent-bubble, frosted-glass card styles) to ensure sufficient color contrast between text and backgrounds in both light and dark themes. Verify that warm-coral sent bubble styles and frosted-glass Ana response card styles have opaque backgrounds and readable text colors. Remove any rules that might inadvertently hide messages (e.g., opacity: 0, transparent backgrounds, or conflicting z-index values).
